ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order was placed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user placing the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., placed, processed, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the billing address */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, digital wallet) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the cart */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the item was added to the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, digital wallet) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., order placed, shipped, delivered) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("id")
)
